commit_scope: Expose model training, routing, proof-run, and learning-surface metadata on the dashboard.

commands: coord join && coord claim "learning dashboard model metadata floor"
Browser desktop render: /dashboard shows 0 native trained, 11 routed models, 14 learning surfaces, 10 recent proofs, 3 proven floors, and no console errors.
Browser mobile render at 390px: learning section visible, no horizontal overflow, no console errors.
local_validation.notes: The dashboard intentionally reports trained_native_model_count=0 until a ledger receipt names native weights. Current routed providers and learning proof floors are visible separately.

ci_validation.notes: CI not run when this local evidence was written.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy was requested for this slice.

phase_gate.gate: Dashboard must show routed models, training metadata, proof receipts, and next-step guidance without claiming nonexistent native weights.
phase_gate.reason: Local API, build, and browser proof passed; CI/deploy proof has not run for this branch yet.
phase_gate.next: Attach actual native weight/data/eval receipts as soon as the first continuously trained Form-native model artifact exists.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The dashboard now exposes a Learning direction section backed by /api/models/learning-dashboard, separating configured third-party routes from proven learning surfaces and native trained weight artifacts.
test_flows: Focused API tests prove current and legacy routing config shapes normalize into dashboard rows.
Focused API tests prove evidence and proof-ledger receipts produce dashboard surfaces and recent proof runs.
Next production build proves the dashboard TypeScript and route graph.
Browser render checks prove the section appears on desktop and mobile without console errors.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is a body-readable learning dashboard. It shows 0 trained native weight artifacts honestly, while exposing routed models, proof surfaces, metadata, evidence paths, north star, floor, guidance, and next gaps.
